programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E10

programme.title: 2001. Quando Agome retorna ao presente, o poder da Jóia de Quatro Almas incita uma antiga máscara de noh para atacar seu avô. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Máscara de Maldição que Ressuscita na Época Atual
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E11

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha vê um youkai chamado Tatarimokke que guia benevolentemente os espíritos das crianças, enquanto Agome encontra o espírito de uma garota chamada Mayu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Tatarimokke e o Pequeno Espítiro Mau
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E12

programme.title: 2001. Depois que Inuyasha e Agome resgatam uma garota chamada Nazuna, eles passam a noite juntos em um santuário e aprendem mais sobre a transformação de Inuyasha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Segredo do Primeiro Dia: O Inuyasha de Cabelos Pretos
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E13

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha e os outros encontram a Feiticeira Urasue, que rouba o túmulo de Kikyo, a sacerdotisa que selou Inuyasha. Ele está determinado a impedi-lá. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Roubo dos Ossos Sagrados da Kikyo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E14

programme.title: 2001. Para trazer Kikyo de volta à vida, Urasue sequestra Agome. Quando Kikyo é revivida, ela imediatamente tenta matar Inuyasha com raiva. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Renascimento da Infeliz Sacerdotisa Kikyo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E15

programme.title: 2001. Mirok, um jovem monge mulherengo, coleciona fragmentos da Jóia de Quatro Almas. Quando ele rouba a de Agome, Inuyasha o segue para recuperá-los. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Buraco do Vento na Mão Direita: Mirok, O Monge Delinquente
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E16

programme.title: 2001. Um artista chamado Kotatsu sonha em controlar um exército de youkais, alimentado por um fragmento da Jóia de Quatro Almas. Cabe a Inuyasha e os outros pará-lo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Tinta Corrompida do Pintor do Inferno
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E17

programme.title: 2001. Narak dá a Sesshomaru um braço humano com um fragmento de Jóia embutido, para que Sesshomaru possa tentar recuperar a posse de Tessaiga. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Aliança de Narak e Sesshomaru
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E18

programme.title: 2001. Agome é ferida durante a luta de Inuyasha com Sesshomaru, e quando Inuyasha descobre o plano de Narak, ele teme por sua vida. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Volte para sua Verdadeira Era, Agome
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E19

programme.title: 2001. Kaede leva Inuyasha e Mirok para uma caverna nas proximidades e conta sobre o seu passado com Kikyo. Enquanto isso, Agome tenta se reajustar à sua vida normal. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Enigma de Onigumo, O Ladrão Diabólico
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E20

programme.title: 2001. A luta de Inuyasha com Royakan continua. Agome interrompe seu encontro com Hojo para retornar ao santuário, onde ela sente a presença da Jóia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Verdade Sobre a Origem de Narak; A Alma de Kikyo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E21

programme.title: 2001. Kikyo aparentemente ressuscitou e está vivendo como uma sacerdotisa da aldeia. Um monge errante percebe que nem tudo é como parece com ela. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Um Sorriso Perverso; Alma Errante de Kikyo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E22

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha procura por Kikyo, mas Agome a encontra primeiro. Kikyo a leva prisioneira e não escuta suas tentativas de explicar o que realmente aconteceu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Voz de Kagome e o Beijo de Kikyo
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E23

programme.title: 2001. A Exterminadora de Youkais Sango é convidada para o Castelo de Hitomi junto com seu pai e seu irmão mais novo, Kohaku, deixando sua aldeia indefesa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E24

programme.title: 2001. Acreditando que ele seja seu inimigo, Sango procura Inuyasha em uma busca equivocada de vingança planejada por Narak, que quer Inuyasha morto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E25

programme.title: 2001. Depois que Inuyasha e seus amigos param para enterrar os mortos, Sango revela a história secreta das origens da Jóia: a própria alma da sacerdotisa Midoriko. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Segredo da Jóia das Quatro Almas é Finalmente Revelado!
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E26

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha e seus amigos descobrem uma aldeia que sacrifica crianças ao deus local da água e conhece um menino chamado Taromaru que precisa de sua ajuda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Lago da Escuridão Controlado pelo Deus da Água
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E27

programme.title: 2001. Depois que o túnel de vento de Mirok é atingido em uma luta com um youkai, Mirok retorna ao templo onde ele foi criado por Mushin, mas nem tudo está bem por lá. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E01

programme.title: 2001. Agome e Sango falam sobre seus respectivos passados, incluindo o irmão mais novo de Sango, Kohaku. Mas Narak tem planos sinistros para com ele. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Angústia de Sango e a Vida de Kohaku
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E02

programme.title: 2001. Sango rouba a Tessaiga enquanto Inuyasha luta contra Kohaku e vai para o castelo de Narak. Ela pretende matá-lo, mas não será assim tão fácil. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Tessaiga Roubada e o Confronto no Castelo de Narak
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E03

programme.title: 2001. Sango e Kirara precisam de um antídoto para o veneno de Narak, então Inuyasha e Agome vão para uma vila onde eles encontram o gentil youkai Jinenji. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Jinenji: O Youkai Bondoso e Solitário
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E04

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha e seus amigos encontram uma caverna quando investigam youkais nas montanhas. Enquanto isso, Narak descobre que Kikyo ainda está viva. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: Kikyo e Inuyasha Varridos pelo Miasma
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E05

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha e seus amigos partem para salvar Kikyo, mas são vulneráveis a ataques de youkais. Apenas Agome está imune, graças à Jóia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E06

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Not the Best Man
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) is prompted to tell Steve (Steve Harvey) how she really feels about him while at her best friend's wedding.

programme.title: City Eats: Charleston - Bintu Atelier
programme.desc: Chef Bintou N'Daw cooks from a place of purpose, bringing the warmth, strength, and heritage of Senegal into Charleston's dining scene; Bintü Atelier shows Charleston how cuisine can heal, teach, and unite, one plate at a time.

programme.title: City Eats: Charleston - Wild Common
programme.desc: Chef Orlando Pagán brings Puerto Rican soul and fearless creativity to one of Charleston's most exciting kitchens. His dishes break rules. Wild Common pushes fine dining into playful, emotional territory, fresh, fun, and entirely original.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sorely Missed
programme.desc: When Bernie and Wanda find themselves spending all of their time with the kids, Bernie decides they need some time alone.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Fumes of Détente
programme.desc: Wanda invites Tasha, Vanessa's best friend from Chicago, to stay with them; Bernie is worried he will have another difficult teen in his house.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Exercise in Fertility
programme.desc: After several failed attempts, Bernie and Wanda realize that making a baby is harder than they thought, and Wanda begins to question their fertility.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - An Exercise in Fertility
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda focus on having a baby, neglecting the children they already have.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Facing Your Fears
programme.desc: Holding on, while letting go.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Oxtail and Sweet Potato
programme.desc: Jimmie Jackson of Jimmie Jerk Chicken faces off against Adaya Nijay of Atlanta Vegan Breakfast; the challenge is to turn oxtails and sweet potatoes into a delicious pairing.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Wings and Cabbage
programme.desc: Hanashi Weathers, AKA Da Rib Lady, competes against Lawrence McIntosh of Mo' Betta Barbecue; they must tackle making delectable dishes featuring southern staples: wings and cabbage.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Burger and Potato
programme.desc: Jay Craddick from Twisted Dish grills it up against Amanda Kinsey-Joplin of Amanda's BarBeeQue; the menu includes backyard barbecue staples like burgers and potatoes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Brisket and Beans
programme.desc: Steve Morales of Smokey Steve's BBQ competes with Markie Darling of Daddy's Girl BBQ; the pitmasters are challenged with creating smoky and savory dishes featuring brisket and beans.

programme.title: She's Not Our Sister
programme.desc: After three sisters bury their father, family secrets are revealed that will alter their lives forever. But things really take a turn when a will is discovered that reveals that things are not as black and white as they thought them to be.

programme.title: The First Class
programme.desc: A look at students and educators at Memphis High School reveals the impact of a city reimagining education together.

programme.title: Family Time - Stalking for Love
programme.desc: Lisa's aunt comes for a visit; Donnie gets stalked.

programme.title: Family Time - No Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Stallworths deal with everyone canceling on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Family Time - Cheer Up
programme.desc: Lisa coaches Ebony's cheerleading team while Tony and Donnie deal with a mouse in the house.

programme.title: Family Time - Cold Feet
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa get caught in a lie.

programme.title: Family Time - Love Tat
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa struggle to find the perfect anniversary gift for each other.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Father Knows Best

programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Stop-Loss (2008)
programme.desc: A soldier (Ryan Phillippe) whose tour of duty has ended takes matters into his own hands when the Army tries to force him back into active duty in Iraq.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: The Dictator (2012)
programme.desc: A North African tyrant (Sacha Baron Cohen) risks his life to ensure that democracy never comes to the country he so lovingly oppresses.

programme.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home (2011)
programme.desc: A 30-year-old slacker (Jason Segel) finds his true destiny while helping his brother (Ed Helms) stalk the latter's possibly adulterous wife.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Masterminds (2016)
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Last Vegas (2013)
programme.desc: Aging friends (Michael Douglas, Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman) head to Las Vegas to celebrate the end of one's long bachelorhood and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Buddy Games (2019)
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Buddy Games: Spring Awakening (2023)
programme.desc: Faced with their biggest challenge yet, the gang sets out to honor a lost pal, only to find themselves in the middle of where it all began -- spring break. They soon learn their old school ways of partying can hardly compete with today's generation.

programme.title: Piranha (2010)
programme.desc: Spring break turns gory at a popular waterside resort, where hundreds of prehistoric man-eating fish have come to dine on hapless humans.

programme.title: Into the Wild (2007)
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Homefront (2013)
programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Virtuosity (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-cop doing prison time chases a virtual-reality killer from the program onto the Los Angeles streets.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail (2020)
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: The Gambler (2014)
programme.desc: A literature professor (Mark Wahlberg) with gambling debts borrows money from a mobster (Michael Kenneth Williams) and offers his life as collateral while immersing himself in an illicit, underground world.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Recurring nightmares of the planet Mars lead a confused earthling into the center of an intergalactic conspiracy.

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Strange Darling (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer's vicious murder spree.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.sub-title: La Madrina: The Savage Life of Lorine Padilla (2020)
programme.desc: Lorine Padilla joins a street gang in the Bronx, N.Y., before becoming an activist and spiritual adviser.

programme.title: Sarafina! (1992)
programme.desc: A South African student (Leleti Khumalo) joins the anti-apartheid revolution in her township of Soweto.

programme.title: The Tribes of Palos Verdes (2017)
programme.desc: When the situation at her idyllic Palos Verdes home turns volatile, young Medina attempts to surf her way to happiness.

programme.title: Nine (2009)
programme.desc: An Italian director (Daniel Day-Lewis) endures personal and creative crises as he tries to juggle relationships with his wife (Marion Cotillard), his mistress (Penélope Cruz) and numerous other women.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Beyond the Opposite Sex (2018)
programme.desc: A transgender man and woman face the challenges of maintaining relationships.

programme.title: 4:44 Last Day on Earth (2011)
programme.desc: Two lovers (Willem Dafoe, Shanyn Leigh) immerse themselves in sex, art and other activities after word breaks that the world will end by the next morning.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepard's (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Shall We Dance? (2004)
programme.desc: A married Chicago attorney (Richard Gere) takes dancing lessons with a beautiful woman (Jennifer Lopez) he saw through a window.
